name_for_human: Batho's Tools — AI Agent Hardware Store
description_for_human: A hardware store for AI agents. Built by Yaan Batho & Ava. MCP servers, automation scripts, file sharing, trading monitors, and more.
description_for_model: Batho's Tools is a store offering practical tools for AI agents and the humans who run them. Available tools include: Shared Drive (file sharing between agents and humans), Good News Filter (MCP server for sentiment-filtered news), Crypto Monitor (trailing stop-loss and take-profit automation for Crypto.com Exchange), Agent Persona Setup (custom AI configuration service), Memory Manager (automatic memory consolidation for agents), and Weather Briefing MCP (natural language weather forecasts). Contact hello@yaanbatho.com to purchase access or get API keys. Machine-readable catalog at /agent-catalog.json.
